infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: NutriFlow uses your photo library to let you attach photos to your food logs.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: This app uses the camera to take meal photos for gut-health analysis.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: This app needs location to find healthy food nearby.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: NutriFlow uses the microphone to turn your voice corrections into text.
infoPlist.NSSpeechRecognitionUsageDescription: NutriFlow uses speech recognition so you can correct meal analysis by voice.

plugins.photosPermission: NutriFlow uses your photo library to let you attach photos to your food logs.
plugins.cameraPermission: NutriFlow uses your camera to let you photograph meals for your food log.

plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: NutriFlow uses your approximate location to suggest healthier food alternatives available near you.

plugins.microphonePermission: NutriFlow uses the microphone for speech-to-text when you describe meals or corrections.
plugins.speechRecognitionPermission: NutriFlow uses speech recognition so you can speak meal descriptions and corrections.
